title: Khuddar
subTitle: A righteous policeman's loved ones pay a heavy price for his fight against crime until his biggest enemy inadvertently hands him an opportunity to tip the scales in favour of justice.

title: Chintu Ji
subTitle: Rishi, the son of a legendary actor, decides to enter politics and go to Hadbahedi, a remote village. However, he creates havoc by misleading the villagers who trust him simply because he is famous.

title: Naagin Bani Suhaagan
subTitle: Vaishali, an ardent devotee of Lord Shiva, is blessed with a boon to transform herself into a shapeshifting snake. She falls into a dilemma when circumstances force her to go against her love.

title: Filler
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Shikari
subTitle: Shankar dreams of working with Natasha in a circus. His life soon takes a turn when he receives a job offer from a circus in the Soviet Union where Natasha is also employed.

title: Daata
subTitle: A decorated school teacher's life is upended by devastating rumours, which ultimately leads to his death. His son Kundan now seeks vengeance.

title: Anth
subTitle: Kali, the son of a gangster, rapes and kills Pooja, and frames her fiance, who is killed in custody, for the crime. As a result, her brother, Vijay, vows revenge against Kali.

title: Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge
subTitle: While travelling across Europe, Raj and Simran unexpectedly grow close, only to be separated by family expectations, prompting Raj to fight for love and tradition.

title: Mehndi
subTitle: Newly-wed Pooja is left shocked when her in-laws and her husband start ill-treating her. Unable to bear the mistreatment, she decides to teach them a lesson.

title: Namak Halaal
subTitle: Arjun, a youngster, works at a hotel owned by Raja and serves him faithfully. However, when he learns about a plot to kill Raja, he decides to save him from harm at any cost.

title: Namak Halaal
subTitle: Arjun, a youngster, works at a hotel owned by Raja and serves him faithfully. However, when he learns about a plot to kill Raja, he decides to save him from harm at any cost.

title: Lorie
subTitle: Geeta Malhotra suffers a miscarriage and yearns to have a child. One day, she finds a lost child and brings him up as her own, only to face trial for his abduction later.

title: Bal Ganesh 3
subTitle: Dhoti, Topi and Suit Boot are more than happy to oblige when a group of alien kids come over to listen to adventure stories about their favourite Bal Ganesh.

title: Filler
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Badrinath Ki Dulhania
subTitle: In Jhansi, Badri's traditional, patriarchal upbringing by his dominant father has shaped him into a chauvinist. He seeks the ideal bride in Vaidehi, an ambitious girl from Kota. Unlike Badri, Vaidehi fights to escape male dominance, craving the independence and identity rarely afforded to small-town Indian women. Their meeting sets off a clash between tradition and aspiration.

title: Silsila
subTitle: Amit sacrifices his love and gets married to his deceased brother's pregnant fiancee. However, when fate brings him face-to-face with his former flame, he decides to give in to his desires.

title: Darr
subTitle: Swept up in a whirlwind of fear and romance, Kiran teeters on the edge of a mental and emotional precipice. While Sunil keeps holding on to her, Rahul spares no effort to drag her down with himself.

title: Baghban
subTitle: Raj and Pooja live an upsetting life when their sons refuse to reciprocate their affections and take care of them.

title: Sholay
subTitle: Jai and Veeru, two ex-convicts, are hired by Thakur Baldev Singh, a retired policeman, to help him nab Gabbar Singh, a notorious dacoit, who has spread havoc in the village of Ramgarh.

title: War
subTitle: Kabir, a secret agent, goes rogue after a mission to catch a terrorist goes awry. However, his boss sends Khalid, another agent and his student, to track him down.

title: War
subTitle: Kabir, a secret agent, goes rogue after a mission to catch a terrorist goes awry. However, his boss sends Khalid, another agent and his student, to track him down.

title: Mahaan
subTitle: A lawyer goes into hiding after being falsely accused of committing a crime, while his wife gives birth to twins. Years later, fate reunites the family under difficult circumstances.

title: Filler
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Dariya Dil
subTitle: Scolded by his family for being a miser, wealthy industrialist Dhaniram loves money. However, his two sons, Ajay and Vijay, are manipulated by their wives and despise their father, looking for ways to entrap him. Soon, he gets into a clash with a tax officer and the officer's siblings devise an evil plot to plunder the businessman's fortune.

title: Ganga Ki Saugand
subTitle: Thakur Jaswant Singh, a tyrannical village landlord, assaults Jeeva's mother and has him thrown out of the village. Jeeva returns as a dacoit in order to take revenge.

title: Izzatdaar
subTitle: When Brahm Dutt, a wealthy businessman, is falsely convicted on murder charges, he enlists the help of a boy to exact revenge on Indrajeet, his cruel son-in-law and the cause of all his miseries.

title: Bewaffa Se Waffa
subTitle: Rukhsar asks her best friend Nagma to marry her husband, Aslam, and mother a child for him when she is unable to do it herself. However, problems begin when Nagma's relatives cause discord among them.

title: Taarzan: The Wonder Car
subTitle: Raj revamps his deceased father's car into a wonderful car named Taarzan and the car comes alive as it is possessed by his father's spirit. Soon, it also starts killing his father's murderers.

title: Karz Chukana Hai
subTitle: After losing his job owing to his arrogance and subsequently his son, Vijay, Atmaram realises his mistake and decides to turn over a new leaf.
